status_notes: Generated from glossary research sweep 2026-05-21; org metadata copied from existing same-org entries under other SecID types.
notes: French government digital agency. Operates France Connect — the French national digital identity SSO. Publishes integration specs and security requirements for service providers.

data.notes: URL is cyber.gouv.fr (ANSSI subdomain); may belong to different namespace if cyber.gouv.fr is registered separately
